channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: China releases Pastor Ezra Jin after diplomatic intervention during Trump-Xi meeting
item.description: Chinese authorities have released Pastor Ezra Jin, founder of the underground Zion Church, after he spent months in detention following a major crackdown on unregistered Christian groups. Jin was arre...

item.title: Brazil and Norway Clash in FIFA World Cup Round of 16
item.description: The Round of 16 match between Brazil and Norway at the FIFA World Cup 2026 is underway at the New York New Jersey stadium in East Rutherford. Brazil, despite being favorites, has a historical record o...

item.title: Novak Djokovic breaks Federer's Wimbledon match-win record with victory over Safiullin
item.description: Novak Djokovic secured his 106th men's singles match win at Wimbledon, surpassing Roger Federer's record, after a hard-fought victory over Russian qualifier Roman Safiullin in the fourth round. The 39...

item.title: Simba Celebrates Domestic Cup Victory with Citywide Parade
item.description: Simba Football Club's victory parade in Dar es Salaam marked the end of a five-year trophy drought, with thousands of supporters transforming the city into a sea of red and white. The parade, followin...

item.title: Amaravati Journalists Demand Immediate Action on Pending Housing Project
item.description: Journalists from various media outlets in Andhra Pradesh have appealed to Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu to expedite the Amaravati housing project for journalists, which has been delayed for year...

item.title: Heat Advisory Issued for Los Angeles County and Southern California Amid Rising Temperatures
item.description: The National Weather Service has issued a heat advisory for Los Angeles County and other parts of Southern California, warning of elevated temperatures and fire weather conditions through Thursday. Me...

item.title: Plateau state tackles human trafficking crisis with victim support
item.description: The Plateau State Government has expressed deep concern over the alarming rise in human trafficking cases, following the rescue of three young women trafficked to Mali and forced into prostitution. Th...

item.title: More Than 400 Arrested After Fourth of July Disturbances in Newport Beach
item.description: Newport Beach officials reported that more than 400 people, many of them young visitors and minors, were arrested during a chaotic Fourth of July weekend that featured illegal fireworks, street fights...

item.title: Catholic Group Excommunicated by Pope Leo Holds Mass
item.description: A rebel Catholic group that was excommunicated by Pope Leo recently celebrated mass, sparking discussions about church discipline and doctrinal adherence. The incident involves the Society of St. Pius...

item.title: Pat Utomi Condemns Alleged Abuse of Presidential Authority and Repeats Call for Age Limit in Nigerian Politics
item.description: Former presidential candidate Pat Utomi has alleged that impunity and disregard for due process have become deeply rooted in Nigeria's political system. In a post shared on his X account, Utomi argued...

item.title: Viral roasted corn seller's ₦2.5 million monthly earnings claim fuels debate over Nigeria's informal economy
item.description: A roadside roasted corn seller has attracted widespread attention after saying in a viral TikTok video that she earns about ₦2.5 million every month from her business. The statement quickly generated ...

item.title: 2026 Hollywoodbets Durban July marquees showcase hospitality, entertainment and themed experiences
item.description: The 2026 Hollywoodbets Durban July brought thousands of visitors to the Hollywoodbets Greyville Racecourse, where the annual horse racing spectacle was complemented by a wide range of premium marquee ...

item.title: Small Businesses Struggle with High Borrowing Costs
item.description: Small and medium-sized businesses across Tanzania are facing severe financial challenges due to persistently high interest rates, which are making it difficult for entrepreneurs to access affordable c...

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump administration policy limiting delivery of mail-in ballots after Election Day
item.description: A federal court has ruled against a Trump administration policy that sought to prevent the U.S. Postal Service from delivering mail-in ballots received after Election Day, finding the measure unlawful...

item.title: Canada Proposes Shifting Nuclear Project Assessments to Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission
item.description: A blog post from nuclear-news.net criticizes recent Canadian federal government initiatives aimed at streamlining and promoting nuclear power development. The article highlights five key announcements...

item.title: Ammonia gas removal operation continues at Tiruvallur factory after 18 worker deaths
item.description: The process of removing ammonia gas from St. Peter and Paul Pvt. Ltd., a seafood processing unit in Tiruvallur district, will continue on Monday. A toxic gas leak on June 21 caused 18 worker deaths an...

item.title: Minions & Monsters narrowly edges out Toy Story 5 at Fourth of July box office
item.description: The animated film 'Minions & Monsters' achieved a modest victory at the Fourth of July box office, securing the top spot with minimal margin over its competitor 'Toy Story 5'. Released on July 5, 2026...

item.title: Uta Uchida Makes Acting Debut as the Antagonist in Netflix Sci-Fi Thriller 'Human Vapor'
item.description: The news article highlights the rising attention on UTA, a Japanese model turned actor, who is making his acting debut in the highly anticipated Japanese-South Korean co-production sci-fi crime thrill...

item.title: Poilievre addresses separatism and emphasizes Canadian unity during speech to Conservative supporters
item.description: Conservative Party of Canada Leader Pierre Poilievre addressed supporters in Calgary, focusing part of his remarks on the issue of separatism and national unity. In his speech, Poilievre responded to ...

item.title: Somali Security Forces Eliminate Al-Shabaab Commander in Basra Village
item.description: Somali security forces have successfully eliminated a senior Al-Shabaab commander during an operation in Basra Village, marking a significant blow to the terrorist group's leadership. The operation, c...
